segments.text: Today we all have assembled here to worship the Sahastrara.
As you've realized that Sahasrara is a very important part of this subtle system,
Of course it's been a great day in 1970 when this chakra was opened up
But by that, what you have achieved we have to see it.
First of all when the Kundalini rises
She goes
To your void
Where is
Your Dharma?
And your dharma gets established
At the Nabhi Chakra
We can say around the Nabhi Chakra
your dharma gets established, which is the innate pure universal religion – is established.
But then kundalini rises higher despite establishment of the Dharma we start becoming
little bit aloof from other societies because they are adharmis and have no dharma also
So I think we are afraid that we might get caught up with their adharmas.
At this stage, you don't want to cross the limits of Sahaja Yoga – one who keeps to
Sahaj Yogis and to our personal Sahaj life is important because first this chakra must
be fully nourished.
And this chakra is actually moves round the Navi Chakra which we know as Swadhisthana.
This swadisthan chakra, in a way very important because it supplies energy to brain so when
Dharma is established, the subtle energy pushes through
Kundalini more energy for the Sahastrara and also
The energy of dharma which was in the Swadhisthana
Also starts flowing with it. It crosses over
and starts rising in the Sahastrara.
Till then we are, I would say
not yet full sahaja yogis
because one can become fanatic about sahaja yoga
–I have seen people who were so fanatical
that they cannot even meet
with those who aren't sahajyogas
They cant talk to anyone
who is not sahajyoga
And all time they're frightened of
meeting people who are not Sahaja Yogis.
Of course, you needn't meet
the People Who Are Evil
–people that are against Sahaj Yoga
and talk against it
but those
who seek
The Truth which is our duty
we have to go them
So many creatures in this state
where
It's established
In the brain
That time
We went beyond
Dharma
Dharma means that dharma becomes part and parcel of our being.
We cannot lose it, such dharma become within us a part
which is very great achievement because then you don't have to do any rituals
You dont'have worry about meeting other people
You don't have to worry that your vibrations will be harmed, then you don' t catch from
anyone.
Your don''t catch also other negative forces – no one can harm them!
That I call as the completion of your Shraddha.
That time Sahasrara is so fully enlightened that you become dharma.
For example, we can give the example of Christ – Christ saw a prostitute being stoned
now Christ had nothing to do with the prostitute I mean just opposite it but when he saw
She was stoned, he took a stone in his hand and He says that those who think
Who have not sinned at all can throw a stone
At Me. And everybody must stand
Why is it taking the side of a prostitute?
He Is A religious man
He should also put stones on her but
he was standing on truth.
That's exactly what happens to you when it is established in Swastrara, that
You stand onto the truth there' s a little difference I would say
In Dharma and in Truth A dharma person might become too dharmic
illogically Dharmik can go right or left
A dharmic person might think he is the superior
to others, that why should you try
save anybody else? Let them go
hell. Who cares! This kind of an attitude
can come in a person who's dharmini
Also I have seen some sahaja yogis
start new methods
In Sahajyoga
You do like this so it will be alright
to do like that it will be all right, because they are not stagnated at the point of dharma.
So this start telling people – you should go in a certain way or another but when rise
To the point of truth, then you don't do any rituals.
You need no religion – they're not bothered because you are in dharma and here
your standing on that truth as truth is much greater than Dharma for example a person
who is standing on truth.
He doesn't care for any absurd ideas about religion,
even about surge-religion!
he does not care that after all this is surge
and it's not surge
–he goes beyond
in the sense she sees a global truth within himself
She sees The Truth which Is All Pervading
Not only sees, but he knows and feels that He is in the truth.
So when dharma flowers into Truth it's a very beautiful happening
And this should happen to all of you
so many things can linger on if You are
Only at Dharma level
I have seen people going into ego
Making money
Sometimes, they don't even ask Me and go on doing things which
They should not do.
There are wrong things that aren´t good for Sahaja Yoga
there is no humility about it
And they dont understand
That whether this dharma
Is standing or truth
Or untruth
So we have to
Go the foundation of Dharma
Which is Truth
As described before
It's a tree of life, which has got its roots up in the brain and branches on his body.
So you have to go through all this and that is where you reach when you are absolutely
established in Sahasrara In the Sahastrara there are all these ideas we have or we
we have taken. We now become dharmic, what is the root of Dharma? Why should be be dharmic
What's need to be Dharmic there are many people in this world who extremely adharmic
living very well according I mean outward expression they feel that their happy people
They are all right, they're enjoying themselves while we are deprived perhaps of
the so-called enjoyments.
So at that state only dharma things become very important to us which may not be standing
on truth there's many thing like I can point it out to you
that how Sahaja Yogis falter, even after achieving dharma state they falter.
I've seen people giving up their drugs, alcoholism
–giving other kinds of addictions–
Even the language improves and there we can say behavior is changed
They become humbler people, no doubt.
But still they are conscious that they're standing on dharma – this consciousness
has to disappear!
At the stage of Sastrana these consciousnesses disappears because truth is love and Love
is truth. That's the point where Kundalini meets Heart Chakra, as you know the pitha
of heart is here so when Kundalini pierces through that Heart Chakra what starts flowing
in brain in Sahasrara is a Truth but Truth that love there' s difference between
Truth as itself, and truth that is love.
So out of Love for the prostitute
Christ stood by her
He stood on the roots
of truth no doubt
but what was flowing through his heart
Was the love
The pure love
so now when we have
Pure love
For someone
We see whole thing in a different manner
We see a person in different manner and it becomes very sweet, otherwise truth can be
bitter.
Can we very painful but the truth which is adorned with love just like flower without
It's very interesting how a person who is pouring with love and he standing on truth.
That the personality you have to become, now in expression of Love we can take an
example understand supposing I meet somebody and his telling all kinds horrible things
about another person. So I feel tremendous love for him, as well
As the one whom he is telling all these things
so now
i take to lie
a complete lie which Is also the truth
In a way
I tell that person see what are you talking
The person About Whom You're saying All this
Has been just praising you all time
And here your Talking like This
Now it's not the Truth actually
But you take the help of lie, other side of it to bring out a friendship between two
persons.
So this is what work love that tries people closer together and say things by which
they become one united.
So all the divisive methods that we have used so far just disappear and
We try to understand what is
The method by which
We can join people's heart as it
Is you are in collective consciousness.
But this collective consciousness if
It superficial,
You achieve great results like
As your done it maybe
You can build beautiful ashrams, you could do all these things.
But when it is filled with love – collective consciousness then the joy is complete of
Collective Consciousness."
Now people talk about peace!
You cannot have Peace without this new awareness we call it Collective Consciousness but
But in that also there has to be main tatva, principle of love.
For example now Sahaja Yogis say from Germany and Austria are going Israel is very fulfilling
I was happy they have chosen for this puja people form Israel
And then I found Israelis coming to Egypt, forgetting all that Muslims have done
them. It's really remarkable how people get attracted towards expression of their
love –to the fellow men and other Sahaja Yogis-and once it starts growing you will
surprised how we can change this world.
Most of the problems, human problem are due to hatred and is very commonly used I hate
– it's absurdity!
It' s a sin too hates someone why do you hate somebody?
You could hate your sins or evil but should not hate people just for hating sake.
This hatred that we have is responsible for all the problems
We Have had so far because
One person becomes very powerful by dividing people he becomes very poor and
These divisive things I've really crushed, So many countries For example our country
Was divided By The British
Now They are having the division
This doesn't stop, by dividing us what has happened all the countries who have gone away
from India are suffering very much.
Those people whom tried to divide country thought that they will become prime ministers
these days most of them had been murdered their own people you can see clearly how
hatred manifests itself. It starts from a small point and it manifests all over, very
clearly –it can be seen in any country being divided– there's no need to divide
anything that creates more hatred or more trouble. In the same way in Sahaja Yoga
we should not think of have divisions now you've got beautiful land as you must
I've heard about neanderthal angels.
Now people are thinking if they can have separate houses, separate compounds – why?
You know how to live collectively you enjoy collective life so why do we want to have
separated house what secrets will be going from each other after all whatever is known
on the vibrations and cannot hide anything
So, why have separate houses?
Why do you want to some privacy because in Sahaja Yoga there's no privacy.
We know about everyone – what are they upto?, What're their problems?,
What chakras They' re Catching?, isn't it?
so There is No secret About anything In Sahajyoga, Everyone knows
about everyone. So what's the use of having privacy also, I can't understand? It is like
this you see still – The mind it working that way then they are thinking of inheritance
all right…I was saying to have inheritance but if your son not a Sahaja Yogi
We cannot keep a culprit there to trouble everyone.
It is not the rules and regulations that are going
To Keep you happy, and join together
But it's pure collective consciousness
And its law
Because as You know we have no proper organizations
No clergy ship
have nothing like that. Leaders also can shift more times than Ganges River can shift its
course, so there is nothing of the kind – it's all on a shifty sand we are standing
in and your mother who tries to do tricks! The reason for this is I want you stand
on rocks. And this rock is emitting love, it's emiting that Divine Love and the joy
of That Love Is really so beautiful! For example people would like to have their separate
bathrooms especially Indians suddenly they've become Britishers and Britisher has become
Indians want to have their separate bathrooms.
I don't know why, and this is a very common disease with the Indians
And it's also spreading
To other people I feel sometimes that they
Wanted them separate bathroom
In collective life there no need
You dont even known
If you ask Me i wont even known if
Have been in bathroom or not
Just go there come back
I have no time for all that.
In the same way you also should have a concept of society which is living like an ocean,
if oceans rises they rise and falls just one eunuch in love.
Now, I am expecting that kind of a society at the foothill
Of Himalayas and i'm sure you all of You
Will realize That himalaya being The Sahastrara
Of the world.
Luckily
I wanted it to be done before
The Sahastra Puranit is done
With blessings of Himalayas
As should say
But Himalaya
Is also like a Sahastrara
the Kundalini has risen, where the vibrations have come up and in sky you can see the vibration.
But this Himalayas is ruled by a wrathful God called Shiva that's dangerous part
of it so we need to be very careful if he try play around take hatred among ourselves
Take to divisive methods, take something that is not Sahaj.
This wrathful God sitting on our head."
He's also in Mecca – this is Bhakkeshwara Shiv there!
If you try misbehave he comes out with his wrathfulness anywhere you are have

That it Maharashtra Allatura and there people started another kind of Sahaja Yoga also

Was saved completely now we had
A Big fire also as you know last time
And nothing happened to You are under protection
You are all the time protected.
There was no wrath of Shiva that could work out anything,
fire would not do any thing to you because we're under protection
but this protection is your mother's love
Is it nothing else? But The Love Of Shri Mataji
which very powerful
and which protecting you and helping
In the same way, you develop that kind of love for others –
For other Sahaja Yogis ,for other people
.For this Mother Earth
Your love can not only protect
You but also protect others.
As long as your attention is on yourself
it will start becoming smaller and smaller
I should have these
I should have that, I like this.
All these topics will fall – you'll never say

No question!
What do i like?
It's difficult for Me to decide if
I like anything
This I like
That I like
Who are You?
Ask yourself the question
If You're The Pure Spirit
It is nothing but love and in Love you think of others, the problems
Of Others. You try to make other's comfortable
.You Try To Look After Other's
And ,you don't just look after yourself
And bother about your self
This Is what we have to reach
Though may be Dharmic
May Be in every way Sahaj
But still unless and until you reach
That state in your Sahastrara, I wouldn't say that you are all right.
You have to work it out for
For that of course meditation is very important
But the thing that stops him
Is Your mind?
It's your mine
That goes on telling me
All The time he watched her mind how we tries to guide
How He Tries To tell you now what about Me
What About my house
What about my children, what about My country?
Like that you go on my-my-my ultimately end up into nothing.
But when You say You!
Kabir has said a beautiful thing about it he says
That When the goat is living
It's saying meh-meh means I-I-I
But it dies, then they take out the intestine and put in on a dhunki which will be there.
They'll put for cleaning of cotton – at that time what does this dhunki say?
Tu hi tu hi tu hi!
You are the one you want to do all these things with and that goes everywhere.
In same way we have think from other's point of view too.
First of all, tu hi when you say it to your guru or to God that You are the one.
I am no more!
I'm dissolved and finished –
i have become One with this ocean of love
And then we'll say
To others
You Are

like The Sun shines

I mean…
…I never tell Myself that I am Adi Shakti there's no need to tell but It is so what

Now God has chosen Me and should say to be the Adishakti alright, I can have it

You won't be proud of the time gold –gold-is-gold why will we be proud off them?

and no more.

become an ocean this drop of light

This kind
consciousness develops in you

just for joy
bubbling with love
bubbling with love

Whether

Of truth

Truth may not be palatable and could

Krishna gave a very good answer he
He said, it's like this – satyam vadet hitam vadet priyam vadet.

me whatever it is but at
end of he will says see

Me I have done something perfect

to say something very harsh or hard for anyone.

You don't have any business in condemning anybody.

will just take it up as great challenge of love

finding faults with the other person

we cannot just thing of Sahaja Yogis
